---
title: "测试"
description: |
  <=test_place_holder=>
author:
  - name: "<=test_place_holder=>"
    url: "https://example.com/<=test_place_holder=>"
    affiliation: "<=test_place_holder=>"
    affiliation_url: "https://example.com/<=test_place_holder=>"
date: 2026-06-05
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

<=test_place_holder=>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  var h1 = document.querySelector(".d-title h1");
  if (!h1 || h1.querySelector(".title-badge")) return;
  h1.classList.add("title-with-badge");
  var img = document.createElement("img");
  img.src = "title-badge.png";
  img.alt = "";
  img.className = "title-badge";
  h1.appendChild(img);
});
</script>
